_comment: L4 compound-primitive: adServiceHighCpu (flagd, RESOURCE fault on ad) + network-latency on shipping (chaos-mesh NetworkChaos delay, NETWORK fault). Two DIFFERENT primitive mechanisms on two different services, applied together (behaves like concurrent). Per docs5/00 §5.5.2. Read by Invoke-MultiFaultOrchestration.ps1 with composition_type=compound_primitive; the ChaosMeshChaos component requires the 2026-06-09 orchestrator extension.
